QF.id: XXVA Code of Conduct and Ethical Standards_22

question.text: Under the RA Code of Conduct, what is the role of compliance in relation to business activities?

answer.text: Compliance is secondary to revenue generation and can be deprioritized during peak business periods
Research analysts and entities shall comply with all regulatory requirements applicable to the conduct of their business activities at all times
Compliance applies only to documented transactions, not verbal communications
Compliance requirements are suspended during market holidays and weekends

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Code item 7 is unambiguous — compliance with ALL regulatory requirements applicable to business activities is mandatory at all times. There are no exceptions based on business pressures, transaction type, or calendar. **The Trap:** Compliance is never secondary to revenue. It applies to all communications (written and verbal). It's not suspended during any period. **Cross-Exam Context:** The universality of compliance obligations is tested across all NISM exams. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Build compliance into your daily routine rather than treating it as an additional burden — when compliance is habitual, it requires minimal extra effort and provides maximum protection.
